summary: Completed testing of Axios Interceptor and Order Edit functionality. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed: 1) Edit button navigates to Configure page with pre-filled data (fabric code TEST-FAB-001), 2) Styling page shows configuration and all styling options, 3) 'Add to WIP' updates existing order (toast: 'Order updated successfully!'), 4) Copy button navigates to Styling page with pre-filled data and 'Returning Customer' badge.

minor.issue: React hydration warnings for <tr> inside <span> elements in WIPOrdersPage.jsx - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning in WIPOrdersPage.jsx - dynamic content wrapper spans causing invalid HTML nesting. Low priority but should be fixed for cleaner console output.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created and cleaned up automatically during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Axios interceptor in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js is working correctly - automatically attaches auth tokens. Order edit flow fully tested: Edit button -> Configure page (pre-filled) -> Styling page -> Add to WIP (updates order). Copy order flow also working: Copy button -> Styling page (pre-filled, 'Returning Customer' badge shown).

axios_interceptor.details: Located at /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js. Automatically attaches Authorization header from localStorage (admin_token or reseller_token). Request interceptor adds 'Bearer {token}' header.

order_edit_from_wip.details: Edit button (data-testid='edit-order-{order_id}') navigates to /reseller/customize/configure with pre-filled data. Fabric code 'TEST-FAB-001' confirmed pre-filled.

order_edit_preserves_data.details: Configuration (fabric, lining, button codes), styling options, and measurements are passed via React Router state and pre-filled in forms.

customer_info_fallback.details: handleEditOrder() in WIPOrdersPage.jsx extracts customer_id and customer_name from order when not in navigation state.

order_update_api.details: PUT /api/orders/{order_id} endpoint correctly updates existing orders. Backend test confirmed update returns updated order with same order_id.

styling_page_save.details: handleAddToWIP() in StylingPage.jsx checks editMode and editOrderId - calls PUT for update, POST for create. Toast shows 'Order updated successfully!' on edit.

copy_order.details: Copy button (data-testid='copy-order-{order_id}') navigates to /reseller/styling with returnMode=true. Configuration pre-filled, 'Returning Customer' badge shown.

api_verification.GET /api/orders: PASS - Returns orders filtered by reseller_email
api_verification.POST /api/orders: PASS - Creates new order with generated order_id
api_verification.GET /api/orders/{order_id}: PASS - Returns single order with full details
api_verification.POST /api/orders/{order_id}/copy: PASS - Creates copy with new order_id
